test.context:
lemma no_children_empty_desc:
  "(\<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot) = (descendants_of slot m = {})" apply(rule iffI) apply(simp add: descendants_of_def cdt_parent_defs) apply(intro allI notI) apply(drule tranclD) apply(simp) apply(fastforce simp: descendants_of_def cdt_parent_defs) done
proof:
lemma no_children_empty_desc:
  "(\<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot) = (descendants_of slot m = {})"
proof_state:
proof (prove)
goal (1 subgoal):
 1. (\<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot) = (descendants_of slot m = {})

proof (prove)
goal (2 subgoals):
 1. \<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot \<Longrightarrow> descendants_of slot m = {}
 2. descendants_of slot m = {} \<Longrightarrow> \<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot

proof (prove)
goal (2 subgoals):
 1. \<forall>a b. m (a, b) \<noteq> Some slot \<Longrightarrow> \<forall>a b. (slot, a, b) \<notin> {(p, c). m c = Some p}\<^sup>+
 2. descendants_of slot m = {} \<Longrightarrow> \<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot

proof (prove)
goal (2 subgoals):
 1. \<And>a b. \<lbrakk>\<forall>a b. m (a, b) \<noteq> Some slot; (slot, a, b) \<in> {(p, c). m c = Some p}\<^sup>+\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False
 2. descendants_of slot m = {} \<Longrightarrow> \<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot

proof (prove)
goal (2 subgoals):
 1. \<And>a b. \<lbrakk>\<forall>a b. m (a, b) \<noteq> Some slot; \<exists>z. (slot, z) \<in> {(p, c). m c = Some p} \<and> (z, a, b) \<in> {(p, c). m c = Some p}\<^sup>*\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False
 2. descendants_of slot m = {} \<Longrightarrow> \<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot

proof (prove)
goal (1 subgoal):
 1. descendants_of slot m = {} \<Longrightarrow> \<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot
test.statement:
lemma no_children_empty_desc:
  "(\<forall>c. m c \<noteq> Some slot) = (descendants_of slot m = {})"
test.name: unnamed_thy_11325

test.context:
lemma live_okE:
    "\<And>P p. \<lbrakk> obj_at P p s; \<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj \<rbrakk>
    \<Longrightarrow> p \<notin> untyped_range cap" apply (drule if_live_then_nonz_capD [OF iflive]) apply simp apply (rule notI) apply (erule ex_nonz_cap_toE) apply (erule untyped_children_in_mdbEE [OF child cap untyped]) apply (clarsimp simp: zobj_refs_to_obj_refs) apply blast apply (drule descendants_range_inD[OF drange]) apply (simp add:cte_wp_at_caps_of_state) apply (simp add:untyped) done
proof:
lemma live_okE:
    "\<And>P p. \<lbrakk> obj_at P p s; \<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj \<rbrakk>
    \<Longrightarrow> p \<notin> untyped_range cap"
proof_state:
proof (prove)
goal (1 subgoal):
 1. \<And>P p. \<lbrakk>obj_at P p s; \<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> p \<notin> untyped_range cap

proof (prove)
goal (2 subgoals):
 1. \<And>P p obj. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; P obj; kheap s p = Some obj\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> live obj
 2. \<And>P p. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; ex_nonz_cap_to p s\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> p \<notin> untyped_range cap

proof (prove)
goal (1 subgoal):
 1. \<And>P p. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; ex_nonz_cap_to p s\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> p \<notin> untyped_range cap

proof (prove)
goal (1 subgoal):
 1. \<And>P p. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; ex_nonz_cap_to p s; p \<in> untyped_range cap\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False

proof (prove)
goal (1 subgoal):
 1. \<And>P p cref. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at (\<lambda>c. p \<in> zobj_refs c) cref s\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False

proof (prove)
goal (2 subgoals):
 1. \<And>P p cref cap'. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at ((=) cap') cref s; p \<in> zobj_refs cap'\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> obj_refs cap' \<inter> untyped_range cap \<noteq> {}
 2. \<And>P p cref cap'. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at ((=) cap') cref s; cap_range cap' \<inter> untyped_range cap \<noteq> {}; cref \<in> descendants_of ptr (cdt s)\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False

proof (prove)
goal (2 subgoals):
 1. \<And>P p a b cap'. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at ((=) cap') (a, b) s; p \<in> obj_refs cap'; \<not> is_zombie cap'; obj_refs cap' \<inter> untyped_range cap = {}\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False
 2. \<And>P p cref cap'. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at ((=) cap') cref s; cap_range cap' \<inter> untyped_range cap \<noteq> {}; cref \<in> descendants_of ptr (cdt s)\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False

proof (prove)
goal (1 subgoal):
 1. \<And>P p cref cap'. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at ((=) cap') cref s; cap_range cap' \<inter> untyped_range cap \<noteq> {}; cref \<in> descendants_of ptr (cdt s)\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False

proof (prove)
goal (2 subgoals):
 1. \<And>P p cref cap'. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at ((=) cap') cref s; cap_range cap' \<inter> untyped_range cap \<noteq> {}\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> caps_of_state s cref = Some (?cap31 P p cref cap')
 2. \<And>P p cref cap'. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at ((=) cap') cref s; cap_range cap' \<inter> untyped_range cap \<noteq> {}; cap_range (?cap31 P p cref cap') \<inter> cap_range cap = {}\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False

proof (prove)
goal (1 subgoal):
 1. \<And>P p cref cap'. \<lbrakk>\<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj; p \<in> untyped_range cap; cte_wp_at ((=) cap') cref s; cap_range cap' \<inter> untyped_range cap \<noteq> {}; cap_range cap' \<inter> cap_range cap = {}\<rbrakk> \<Longrightarrow> False
test.statement:
lemma live_okE:
    "\<And>P p. \<lbrakk> obj_at P p s; \<And>obj. P obj \<Longrightarrow> live obj \<rbrakk>
    \<Longrightarrow> p \<notin> untyped_range cap"
test.name: unnamed_thy_10584
